ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Low, via ZOOM, for Sonia Lee, Personal Representative.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding why he has yet to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status. Counsel reports that he has an inventory and appraisal ready to file and an update regarding creditors and asks for a continuance to file the papers that the court is requesting.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 23, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
